# comfyui_kling_image_to_video_with_audio (Resource)

ComfyUI ImageToVideoWithAudio node — Kling 2.6 Image(First Frame) to Video with Audio [api node/video/Kling]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `duration` (String) Input: COMBO
- `generate_audio` (Boolean) Input: BOOLEAN default: true
- `mode` (String) Input: COMBO
- `model_name` (String) Input: COMBO
- `prompt` (String) Input: STRING
- `start_frame` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `video_output` (String) Output: VIDEO (slot 0)
